# juju_storage_pool (List Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
list "juju_storage_pool" "this" {
  provider         = juju
  include_resource = true

  config {
    model_uuid = "<model-uuid>"

    # Optional: filter by storage pool name
    # name = "my-storage-pool"

    # Optional: filter by storage provider
    # storage_provider = "ebs"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model_uuid` (String) The Juju model UUID.

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filter by storage pool name.
- `storage_provider` (String) Filter by storage provider type.
